trv.notes: Supply and fit thermostatic radiator valves to existing radiators.

flow_temp_optimization.notes: Engineer visit for balancing, flow temperature reduction and controls tuning.

setpoint_optimization.notes: Controls review and scheduling update to reduce room target temperatures while maintaining minimum comfort.

window_upgrade.notes: Replacement with high-performance glazing; material pricing is read from openings.json.

door_upgrade.notes: Replacement of external doors with insulated units; material pricing is read from openings.json.

wall_insulation_internal_retrofit.notes: Indicative internal wall insulation retrofit cost. Thickness defaults to stud cavity depth; optional additional internal service layer can be enabled for deeper retrofit.

floor_insulation.notes: Indicative suspended/solid floor insulation retrofit cost estimate. Thickness defaults to joist cavity depth where available.

loft_insulation.notes: Top-up loft insulation supply and fit estimate. Thickness defaults to joist/cavity depth where available.
